verses.en: Have you seen the one who denies the Recompense?
For that is the one who drives away the orphan
verses.id: Maka itulah orang yang menghardik anak yatim,

verses.en: And does not encourage the feeding of the poor.
verses.id: dan tidak mengajak memberi makan orang miskin.

verses.en: So woe to those who pray
[But] who are heedless of their prayer -
Those who make show [of their deeds]
